title: trifolium arvense subsp. longisetosum
intro: Trifolium arvense subsp. longisetosum, also known as the red clover, is a perennial legume with trifoliate leaves and a distinctive red or pink flower. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote blood vessel health and alleviate menopausal symptoms due to its high isoflavone content. The health benefits of Trifolium arvense subsp. longisetosum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in capsule, tea, or tincture form, often used as a dietary supplement to support women's health and overall well-being.
